items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】Gucci Luce series mini shoulder bag. The Gucci Luce collection exudes a playful and fun vibe, with "Luce" meaning "Light" in Italian. Original GG canvas infuses this elegant mini shoulder bag with design essence. Blue leather trim and light gold-tone hardware complement the beige and ebony pattern. An adjustable brown leather shoulder strap adds functionality. Beige and ebony classic GG canvas, blue leather, light gold-tone metal hardware, cotton-linen blend lining, Gucci monogram zipper pull, interior: one flat pocket, adjustable shoulder strap (20cm high), twist lock closure, weight: approx. 0.25kg.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】Gucci Bamboo 1947 series small bamboo handbag. The Gucci Bamboo 1947 series handbags ingeniously incorporate unique designs such as handcrafted bamboo handles, buckles, and mirrors (encased in leather), showcasing the brand's classic style and exquisite craftsmanship. Visit designated stores or experience exclusive selection with the assistance of a client advisor. Red patent leather, gold-tone bamboo hardware, leather lining, interior: one zip pocket; one open pocket with mirror, web strap length: 81-125cm; leather strap length: 99-111cm, bamboo handle (11cm high), web strap height: 41-64cm; leather strap height: 50-58cm, bamboo buckle closure, weight: approx. 0.9kg.

items.name_en: 💖Complete with original green box packaging💖【New】The GG Ophidia series blends Gucci's heritage with modern design to present a striking new piece. This wallet is crafted from grey and black GG Supreme canvas, accented with palladium-toned double G hardware, making the design even more eye-catching. Grey and black GG Supreme canvas, grey leather trim, palladium-toned double G hardware, removable wrist strap (13cm high), zip closure.

items.name_en: .💖[Full set of original green packaging]💞Small GG shoulder bag. The GG pattern is reinterpreted every season, accumulating decades of rich heritage. This symbol not only represents the initials of the brand's founder but also subtly pays tribute to the Gucci houndstooth pattern originating from the 1930s. By merging different eras of Gucci's history, this pattern honors the brand's origins while innovating. This black small shoulder bag features an interlocking letter pattern. Hidden Details · Black embossed GG leather · Gold-tone hardware · As a selected item with a Gucci Tag, this product supports NFC technology to help verify authenticity and enjoy a digital innovation experience. Cotton-linen lining · Inside: 1 zip pocket · Handle height: 15cm · Detachable shoulder strap (30cm high) · Double G and rivet lock · Weight: approx. 0.6kg.
